mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in the unemployment rate above 0.3 percentage points over one month signals deteriorating labor market conditions, which weakens corporate earnings expectations and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in industrial production and inflation signals overcapacity in goods markets, which compresses profit margins and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where both INDPRO and CPIAUCSL rise, or interaction effect is not statistically significant (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: During monetary tightening cycles, rising federal funds rates combined with declining consumer spending signals recession risks, which drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 60% of instances where FEDFUNDS > 4.5% and RSAFS declines, or interaction effect is not statistically significant (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Strong monthly job growth above 100,000 jobs signals robust labor market conditions that boost consumer spending and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances where PAYEMS > 100,000, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A surge in housing starts above 1,100,000 units signals strong demand for residential construction, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where HOUST > 1100, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in industrial production and declining manufacturing inventories signals strong demand for goods, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 60% of instances where INDPRO rises and FEDFUNDS falls, or interaction effect is not statistically significant (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: During late-cycle expansions, rising consumer spending combined with declining GDP growth signals overheating economic conditions, which drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where RSAFS rises and GDPC1 declines, or interaction effect is not statistically significant (p > 0.05).
